venues.name: Melbourne Cricket Ground
venues.knownFor: World's largest cricket stadium, big boundaries, pacers love it

venues.name: Sydney Cricket Ground
venues.knownFor: Historic venue, spin can be effective in later stages

venues.name: Wankhede Stadium
venues.knownFor: High-scoring ground, Mumbai sea breeze helps swing early

venues.name: M. Chinnaswamy Stadium
venues.knownFor: Smallest boundaries in India, altitude aids ball flight. Highest T20 scores

venues.name: Eden Gardens
venues.knownFor: Spin-friendly from day 1, iconic atmosphere, dew factor at night

venues.name: Narendra Modi Stadium
venues.knownFor: World's largest stadium, dry pitch, big boundaries

venues.name: Lord's Cricket Ground
venues.knownFor: Home of cricket, famous slope, overcast = massive swing

venues.name: Edgbaston
venues.knownFor: Boisterous crowd, swing in English conditions, seamer heaven

venues.name: New Wanderers Stadium
venues.knownFor: Bullring — highest altitude major venue, ball travels 15% further

venues.name: Newlands Cricket Ground
venues.knownFor: Beautiful setting, good pace and bounce, can swing under clouds

venues.name: Gaddafi Stadium
venues.knownFor: Flat, high-scoring, spin effective in later overs

venues.name: Eden Park
venues.knownFor: Smallest boundaries, unique oval shape, NZ fortress

venues.name: Sharjah Cricket Stadium
venues.knownFor: Tiny ground, batters paradise, high scores very common
